KeysToEntries.Helmet_SSh60_Description: A steel Soviet-era helmet that was widely used by various branches of the Soviet military and later by the Russian armed forces. While it has been largely phased out in favor of more modern helmet designs, it remains an iconic representation of Cold War-era military gear.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_SSh68n_Description: The SSh-68N is a battle-tested steel helmet, offering reliable protection against ballistic threats and shrapnel. Although newer helmet models have emerged, the SSh-68N remains in service due to its proven durability and affordability, making it an essential piece of equipment for troops in many regions around the world.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Type66_Description: The Type 66 helmet is based on the legendary US M1 helmet. Although it has mostly been replaced by the Type 88 helmet, the Type 66 is still used for training exercises and by reserve units of Japanese National Defense Forces.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_SkullCrusher_Description: A lightweight solution for mounting NVG devices to the user's head without requiring a helmet.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_6b47Ratnik_Description: An advanced ballistic helmet and a key component of the Ratnik modern infantry combat system. With its innovative design and materials, it provides superior protection against ballistic threats and impact. Designed to accommodate various attachments, the 6B47 allows the integration of night vision goggles, communication devices, and other accessories, enhancing situational awareness and combat effectiveness.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Lshz1_Black_Description: A copy of the Ops-Core FAST helmet, the LshZ 1+ has a flatter shell and was designed to mount Russian night vision and communication devices. It offers enhanced peripheral vision and comfort, while providing comprehensive coverage for vital areas.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Lshz1_Multicam_Description: A copy of the Ops-Core FAST helmet, the LshZ 1+ has a flatter shell and was designed to mount Russian night vision and communication devices. It offers enhanced peripheral vision and comfort, while providing comprehensive coverage for vital areas.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichTc2000_UN_Description: A modern combat helmet providing advanced ballistic and fragmentation protection. The NVG shroud allows for the installation of night vision devices, while adjustable padding ensures a secure fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichTc2000_Black_Description: A modern combat helmet providing advanced ballistic and fragmentation protection. The NVG shroud allows for the installation of night vision devices, while adjustable padding ensures a secure fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichTc2000_Green_Description: A modern combat helmet providing advanced ballistic and fragmentation protection. Its adjustable padding ensures a secure and comfortable fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Type88_Description: The Type 88 helmet is a first-generation composite helmet used by Japanese National Defense Forces. Based on the PASGT design, it was developed to safeguard its users from fragments and handgun projectiles.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Type88Type2_Description: The Type 88 helmet is a first-generation composite helmet used by Japanese National Defense Forces. Based on the PASGT design, it was developed to safeguard its users from fragments and handgun projectiles.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Pastg_Description: A Chinese helmet inspired by the classic M88. Made from UHMWPE, it offers adequate protection compared to its Western counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichLc_Description: A Chinese helmet inspired by the classic MICH-2000. Made from UHMWPE, it offers adequate protection compared to its Western counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Qgf03_Description: The QGF-03 is a composite helmet based on the MICH design developed for the Chinese military. Along with its predecessor, it has replaced the steel helmets previously used by the armed forces.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Qgf03_Woodland_Description: The QGF-03 is a composite helmet based on the MICH design developed for the Chinese military. Along with its predecessor, it has replaced the steel helmets previously used by the armed forces.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichTc2002_Green_Description: An advanced version of the MICH TC-2000 combat helmet, offering upgraded ballistic protection and features. It retains the streamlined and lightweight characteristics of its predecessor, reducing strain and fatigue during extended missions.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_MichTc2002_Tan_Description: An advanced version of the MICH TC-2000 combat helmet, offering upgraded ballistic protection and features. It retains the streamlined and lightweight characteristics of its predecessor, reducing strain and fatigue during extended missions.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Exfil_CoyoteBrown_Description: The EXFIL Ballistic is an advanced and versatile helmet engineered for superior protection and performance in high-risk environments. It features a hybrid composite shell and guarantees an optimal fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Exfil_Multicam_Description: The EXFIL Ballistic is an advanced and versatile helmet engineered for superior protection and performance in high-risk environments. It features a hybrid composite shell and guarantees an optimal fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_TorL_Description: The Tor-L is a lightweight, combat-ready helmet designed for high-stakes engagements. Its internal shock-absorbing pads mitigate the impact of non-penetrating hits, and its quick-adjustment system ensures a secure and comfortable fit.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_FastMt_Tan_Description: The FAST (Future Assault Shell Technology) MT is a high-performance tactical ballistic helmet manufactured by Ops-Core. Engineered with state-of-the-art materials, it provides exceptional protection and enhanced peripheral vision, promoting situational awareness in dynamic environments.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_FastMt_Multicam_Description: The FAST (Future Assault Shell Technology) MT is a high-performance tactical ballistic helmet manufactured by Ops-Core. Engineered with state-of-the-art materials, it provides exceptional protection and enhanced peripheral vision, promoting situational awareness in dynamic environments.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Amp1TpMc_RangerGreen_Description: The AMP-1 TP MC (Mid Cut) is a state-of-the-art, modular and comfortable ballistic helmet with next-to-zero bullet penetration. It is fully customizable and allows for various attachments while offering total head protection during close-quarter combat operations.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Amp1TpLc_RangerGreen_Description: The AMP-1 TP LC (Low Cut) is a state-of-the-art, modular and comfortable ballistic helmet with next-to-zero bullet penetration. It is fully customizable and allows for various attachments while offering total head protection during close-quarter combat operations.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Amp1TpLc_UN_Description: The AMP-1 TP LC (Low Cut) is a state-of-the-art, modular and comfortable ballistic helmet with next-to-zero bullet penetration. It is fully customizable and allows for various attachments while offering total head protection during close-quarter combat operations.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_FastXpHc_Olive_Description: The FAST XP HC is a top-tier, high-cut ballistic helmet designed to meet the needs of specialized military and law enforcement units. Its advanced ballistic protection provides superior protection against many threats on the battlefield.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_FastXpHc_Multicam_Description: The FAST XP HC is a top-tier, high-cut ballistic helmet designed to meet the needs of specialized military and law enforcement units. Its advanced ballistic protection provides superior protection against many threats on the battlefield.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_BkAch_Green_Description: The BK-ACH is a modern ballistic helmet designed for police and military use. Its EBSP manufacturing process provides protection against fragments and shrapnel while offering increased resistance to environmental factors.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_BkAchHc_Green_Description: The BK-ACH is a modern ballistic helmet designed for police and military use. Its EBSP manufacturing process provides protection against fragments and shrapnel while offering increased resistance to environmental factors.
KeysToEntries.Helmet_Qgf03_Ghillie_Description: The QGF-03 is a composite helmet based on the MICH design developed for the Chinese military. Along with its predecessor, it has replaced the steel helmets previously used by the armed forces. This one has been customized with additional camouflage.
